Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests

Class AbstractReasonerTests.ReasonerInputSerializer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests.AbstractReasonerTests.ReasonerInputSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasonerInputReader, IReasonerInputWriter
Enclosing class:
AbstractReasonerTests
private static class AbstractReasonerTests.ReasonerInputSerializer extends Object implements IReasonerInputReader, IReasonerInputWriter
Trivial implementation for reasoner serialisation tests.
